# DSM — Digital Software Market

> DSM is a premier digital showroom for genuine software licensing. We sell authentic, perpetual and volume licenses for Microsoft (Windows, Office, Server), Adobe Creative Cloud, Autodesk/AEC, antivirus & security, and server solutions — with instant digital delivery, concierge support, and enterprise-grade assurance. Serving creators and enterprises since 1994.

DSM (digitalsoftwaremarket.com) offers genuine software licenses with instant delivery, a B2B reseller program with wholesale/tiered pricing, and a free exclusive-member tier for member pricing and renewal alerts. AI-assisted tools provide instant quotes and savings estimates.

## Key pages
- [Store](https://digimax-93q.pages.dev/store): Browse and buy genuine software licenses — Microsoft Office, Windows, Windows Server, Adobe Creative Cloud, Autodesk, antivirus & security.
- [Support](https://digimax-93q.pages.dev/support): Help center, activation guides, order status, refund policy, contact support.
- [Reseller Program](https://digimax-93q.pages.dev/reseller): Free B2B account — wholesale pricing (tiered by volume), deal registration, bulk quotes, commission tracking.
- [Exclusive Members](https://digimax-93q.pages.dev/exclusive): Free membership — member pricing, one dashboard for licenses & renewals, insider launch alerts.
- [Account](https://digimax-93q.pages.dev/account): Sign in or create a free account; view order history and licenses.
- [Cart](https://digimax-93q.pages.dev/cart): Review items and check out.

## Solutions by role
- Enterprise & IT: Volume licensing for Microsoft 365, Windows Server, and Security.
- Creative Studio: Adobe Creative Cloud and design tooling.
- AEC & BIM: Autodesk, V-Ray and CAD/BIM software.
- Education: Special pricing for students and faculty.

## Related sites
- [Marketing](https://digimax-93q.pages.dev/marketing): DSM digital marketing services.
- [Services](https://digimax-93q.pages.dev/services): DSM × TechRealm engineered systems & AI services.
